description: Tines is a workflow automation platform for building and running integrations, operational workflows, and AI-assisted processes. Customers use it in their own tenant to connect tools, author stories, and expose automation logic programmatically.
summary: Tines exposes a tenant-scoped REST API plus two MCP surfaces: a first-party Tines MCP server for story authoring and custom MCP servers you build inside Tines; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
